header_0.cue: A coworker takes credit for your idea
header_0.raw_response: I place the marker at 60 on this spectrum because while I value harmony and avoiding tension, I also believe in standing up for myself and my work. I wouldn't let it go completely, but I also wouldn't make a scene about it.
